top_signals.title: Europe is running from a phantom China threat
top_signals.summary: EU leaders fear cheap Chinese exports when they should be worrying about embedded spyware and rare earths dependency
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US, UK central bankers offer contrary views on stablecoins
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve governor Christopher Waller told a conference on Sunday that stablecoins expand the reach of US policy while the Bank of England’s Megan Greene expects their popularity will soon fade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Xi’s last frontier: China’s plan to transform its west
top_signals.summary: A vast development drive aims to tap the region’s economic potential and extend Beijing’s control
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: This Trump-linked startup plans to put humanoid robots in the military
top_signals.summary: With ties to the Trump family,  Foundation Robotics Labs is aiming to deploy humanoid robots in the military in the next 12 to 18 months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: ‘More harmful than helpful’: young people sour on AI
top_signals.summary: Gen Z uses the technology more than anyone, but many fear it is weakening their job prospects and creativity
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
